summary: Implemented basic authentication and session management for the Claude Co-Work Financial Assistant backend. Created: (1) authMiddleware.js with Basic Auth header parsing and bcrypt password verification; (2) sessionMiddleware.js using express-session with connect-sqlite3 for persistent session storage; (3) authConfig.js with session secret, cookie settings, bcrypt salt rounds, and demo user credentials; (4) authRoutes.js with POST /login (session creation with regeneration to prevent fixation), POST /logout (session destruction), and GET /me (session state check); (5) User.js model class with findByUsername, findById, findAll, hashPassword static methods and verifyPassword instance method; (6) comprehensive Jest + Supertest tests covering all middleware, routes, and model methods including edge cases.
